---
title: "Course notes — Geostatistics and Mining Geology"
---

Open-access course notes for **GLQ3401 — Geostatistics and Mining Geology** and **GLQ3651 — Mining Geology**.

::: {.card .hover-lift}
::: {.card-header}
### Course notes website
:::
::: {.card-body}
The full course material is published online and updated each term.

[{{< fa book-open >}} Open the course notes](https://danlauz.github.io/glq3401-3651/){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

*This page can be expanded with the syllabus, learning objectives and resources — let me know what you'd like to include.*
